title: Count Triplets That Can Form Two Arrays of Equal XOR
hints: a == b is equivalent to a ^ b == 0, which means the XOR sum of the entire segment from i to k must be zero.
Precompute prefix XORs so that the XOR sum of any subarray can be retrieved in constant time using exclusive or properties.
Once you identify a pair (i, k) with zero total XOR, every index j strictly between i and k forms a valid triple.
